title: selaginella leveriana
intro: Selaginella leveriana, also known as the Resurrection Fern, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its unique ability to dry out and revive itself when water is available. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Selaginella leveriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
